title: Anamne — your AI conversation memory - Chrome Web Store
excerpt: Capture your ChatGPT & Claude chats into a private, searchable archive you own — and sync them to Obsidian. Local-first.
content_html:
Overview

Capture your ChatGPT & Claude chats into a private, searchable archive you own — and sync them to Obsidian. Local-first.

Anamne — capture, search, and own your ChatGPT & Claude conversations. Your AI chats are full of answers you'll never find again. Anamne turns ChatGPT and Claude into one private, searchable memory you own, and keeps a copy in your own Obsidian vault. Everything you've asked is one search away. 🟢 THE PROBLEM You've had hundreds of conversations across ChatGPT and Claude. The answer you need is in there somewhere, buried across two sites and two histories you can't really search. Your AI history is a goldmine you can't dig into, and it lives on someone else's server. 🟢 WHAT ANAMNE DOES Anamne saves your conversations into a single library on your own device. Search it, organize it, write it to Obsidian, and keep it in sync across your machines. No account needed to start. ✨ KEY FEATURES 🔍 Search everything you've asked Full-text search across every captured conversation by title, keyword, folder, or tag. Filter to one assistant with provider tabs, or search them all at once. 🗂️ Organize your history Sort conversations into nested folders, add your own tags, and star what matters. Move, tag, or delete many at once with bulk actions. A clean reading pane shows each chat as bubbles, with per-message timestamps. 📝 Sync to Obsidian Grant a vault folder once and Anamne writes clean Markdown, with frontmatter and per-turn headings, straight into your notes. No API keys and no copy-paste. Export any conversation to a Markdown file whenever you want. ⚡ Prompt library Save your best prompts with fill-in {{fields}} and drop them into any chat in one click, right on the page. 🖼️ Save the images (Pro) When ChatGPT or Gemini generates an image, Anamne saves the full file with the conversation that made it, in your archive and your Obsidian vault, ready to view or download. 🔄 Encrypted sync across your devices (Pro) Your archive stays in step on every machine you use, encrypted on your device before it leaves. New chats and edits reach every device, and an automatic backup lets you rebuild your library on a new machine in one click. 🤖 More assistants (Pro) ChatGPT and Claude on Free. Add Gemini, Perplexity, Grok, and DeepSeek with Pro. One library, one search, all your AIs. 🔒 PRIVATE BY DESIGN Capturing, searching, organizing, and Obsidian sync run entirely on your device. Your conversations are stored locally and never leave your browser. Cloud sync is opt-in and end-to-end encrypted: the key stays on your device, so all the server ever holds is ciphertext it cannot read. No account, no telemetry. Anamne reads the structured data the AI apps already fetch, so a site redesign won't break your capture. 🟢 WHO IT'S FOR Researchers, writers, developers, students, and founders who live in AI chat and are tired of losing their best conversations. Open Anamne from your toolbar on the AI sites you already use. 📪 Questions or feedback? Email hello@getanamne.com — we read everything. 🔒 Privacy policy: https://getanamne.com/privacy.html Works on Chrome and Edge (Chromium browsers with the File System Access API). Anamne is an independent product and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by OpenAI or Anthropic. ChatGPT and Claude are trademarks of their respective owners.

Details

  • Version

    1.1.3

  • Updated

    July 7, 2026

  • Features

    Offers in-app purchases

  • Size

    107KiB

  • Languages

    English

  • Developer

    Full Marketing Power LLC
    1111B S Governors Ave Dover, DE 19904 US

    Website
    Email

    info@fullmarketingpower.com

  • Non-trader

    This developer has not identified itself as a trader. For consumers in the European Union, please note that consumer rights do not apply to contracts between you and this developer.

Privacy

Manage extensions and learn how they're being used in your organization

The developer has disclosed that it will not collect or use your data. To learn more, see the developer’s privacy policy.

This developer declares that your data is

  • Not being sold to third parties, outside of the approved use cases
  • Not being used or transferred for purposes that are unrelated to the item's core functionality
  • Not being used or transferred to determine creditworthiness or for lending purposes

sentences.en: Anamne — capture, search, and own your ChatGPT & Claude conversations.
sentences.zh: Anamne — 捕获、搜索并拥有您的 ChatGPT 和 Claude 对话。

sentences.en: Your AI chats are full of answers you'll never find again.
sentences.zh: 你的人工智能聊天充满了你再也找不到的答案。

sentences.en: Anamne turns ChatGPT and Claude into one private, searchable memory you own, and keeps a copy in your own Obsidian vault.
sentences.zh: Anamne 将 ChatGPT 和 Claude 变成您拥有的私人可搜索内存，并在您自己的黑曜石保险库中保留一份副本。

sentences.en: Everything you've asked is one search away. 🟢 THE PROBLEM You've had hundreds of conversations across ChatGPT and Claude.
sentences.zh: 您所问的所有问题只需一次搜索即可解决。 🟢 问题 您已经通过 ChatGPT 和 Claude 进行了数百次对话。

sentences.en: The answer you need is in there somewhere, buried across two sites and two histories you can't really search.
sentences.zh: 您需要的答案就在某个地方，埋藏在您无法真正搜索的两个站点和两个历史记录中。

sentences.en: Your AI history is a goldmine you can't dig into, and it lives on someone else's server. 🟢 WHAT ANAMNE DOES Anamne saves your conversations into a single library on your own device.
sentences.zh: 你的人工智能历史是一座你无法挖掘的金矿，它存在于别人的服务器上。 🟢 ANAMNE 的作用 Anamne 将您的对话保存到您自己设备上的单个库中。

sentences.en: Search it, organize it, write it to Obsidian, and keep it in sync across your machines.
sentences.zh: 搜索它、组织它、将其写入 Obsidian，并使其在计算机之间保持同步。

sentences.en: No account needed to start. ✨ KEY FEATURES 🔍 Search everything you've asked Full-text search across every captured conversation by title, keyword, folder, or tag.
sentences.zh: 无需帐户即可启动。 ✨ 主要功能 🔍 搜索您询问的所有内容 按标题、关键字、文件夹或标签对每个捕获的对话进行全文搜索。

sentences.en: Filter to one assistant with provider tabs, or search them all at once. 🗂️ Organize your history Sort conversations into nested folders, add your own tags, and star what matters.
sentences.zh: 使用提供商选项卡过滤到一位助手，或一次搜索所有助手。 🗂️ 整理您的历史记录将对话分类到嵌套文件夹中，添加您自己的标签，并对重要内容加注星标。

sentences.en: Move, tag, or delete many at once with bulk actions.
sentences.zh: 通过批量操作一次移动、标记或删除多个。

sentences.en: A clean reading pane shows each chat as bubbles, with per-message timestamps. 📝 Sync to Obsidian Grant a vault folder once and Anamne writes clean Markdown, with frontmatter and per-turn headings, straight into your notes.
sentences.zh: 干净的阅读窗格将每个聊天显示为气泡，并带有每条消息的时间戳。 📝 同步到黑曜石 授予一个保管库文件夹一次，Anamne 会直接将带有前题和每回合标题的干净 Markdown 写入您的笔记中。

sentences.en: No API keys and no copy-paste.
sentences.zh: 没有 API 密钥，也没有复制粘贴。

sentences.en: Export any conversation to a Markdown file whenever you want. ⚡ Prompt library Save your best prompts with fill-in {{fields}} and drop them into any chat in one click, right on the page. 🖼️ Save the images (Pro) When ChatGPT or Gemini generates an image, Anamne saves the full file with the conversation that made it, in your archive and your Obsidian vault, ready to view or download. 🔄 Encrypted sync across your devices (Pro) Your archive stays in step on every machine you use, encrypted on your device before it leaves.
sentences.zh: 随时将任何对话导出到 Markdown 文件。 ⚡ 提示库通过填写 {{fields}} 保存您最好的提示，然后在页面上一键将其放入任何聊天中。 🖼️ 保存图像（专业版） 当 ChatGPT 或 Gemini 生成图像时，Anamne 会将完整文件及其生成的对话保存在您的存档和黑曜石保险库中，以供查看或下载。 🔄 跨设备加密同步（专业版）您的存档在您使用的每台计算机上保持同步，并在离开之前在设备上进行加密。

sentences.en: New chats and edits reach every device, and an automatic backup lets you rebuild your library on a new machine in one click. 🤖 More assistants (Pro) ChatGPT and Claude on Free.
sentences.zh: 新的聊天和编辑可到达每台设备，自动备份可让您一键在新计算机上重建库。 🤖 更多助手（专业版）ChatGPT 和 Claude 免费。

sentences.en: Add Gemini, Perplexity, Grok, and DeepSeek with Pro.
sentences.zh: 在 Pro 中添加 Gemini、Perplexity、Grok 和 DeepSeek。

sentences.en: One library, one search, all your AIs. 🔒 PRIVATE BY DESIGN Capturing, searching, organizing, and Obsidian sync run entirely on your device.
sentences.zh: 一个图书馆，一次搜索，所有人工智能。 🔒 私密设计 捕获、搜索、组织和黑曜石同步完全在您的设备上运行。

sentences.en: Your conversations are stored locally and never leave your browser.
sentences.zh: 您的对话存储在本地，永远不会离开您的浏览器。

sentences.en: Cloud sync is opt-in and end-to-end encrypted: the key stays on your device, so all the server ever holds is ciphertext it cannot read.
sentences.zh: 云同步是选择加入和端到端加密的：密钥保留在您的设备上，因此服务器保存的所有内容都是它无法读取的密文。

sentences.en: No account, no telemetry.
sentences.zh: 没有帐户，没有遥测。

sentences.en: Anamne reads the structured data the AI apps already fetch, so a site redesign won't break your capture. 🟢 WHO IT'S FOR Researchers, writers, developers, students, and founders who live in AI chat and are tired of losing their best conversations.
sentences.zh: Anamne 会读取人工智能应用程序已获取的结构化数据，因此网站重新设计不会破坏您的捕获。 🟢 适合谁生活在人工智能聊天中并厌倦了失去最好的对话的研究人员、作家、开发人员、学生和创始人。

sentences.en: Open Anamne from your toolbar on the AI sites you already use. 📪 Questions or feedback?
sentences.zh: 从您已使用的 AI 网站上的工具栏打开 Anamne。 📪 有问题或反馈吗？

sentences.en: Email hello@getanamne.com — we read everything. 🔒 Privacy policy: https://getanamne.com/privacy.html Works on Chrome and Edge (Chromium browsers with the File System Access API).
sentences.zh: 发送电子邮件至 hello@getanamne.com — 我们阅读了所有内容。 🔒 隐私政策：https://getanamne.com/privacy.html 适用于 Chrome 和 Edge（具有文件系统访问 API 的 Chromium 浏览器）。

sentences.en: Anamne is an independent product and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by OpenAI or Anthropic.
sentences.zh: Anamne 是一款独立产品，不隶属于 OpenAI 或 Anthropic，也不受其认可或赞助。

sentences.en: ChatGPT and Claude are trademarks of their respective owners.
sentences.zh: ChatGPT 和 Claude 是其各自所有者的商标。

content_html_zh:
概述

将您的 ChatGPT 和 Claude 聊天记录保存到您拥有的私人可搜索存档中 - 并将它们同步到 Obsidian。 本地优先。

Anamne — 捕获、搜索并拥有您的 ChatGPT 和 Claude 对话。 你的人工智能聊天充满了你再也找不到的答案。 Anamne 将 ChatGPT 和 Claude 变成您拥有的私人可搜索内存，并在您自己的黑曜石保险库中保留一份副本。 您所问的所有问题只需一次搜索即可解决。 🟢 问题 您已经通过 ChatGPT 和 Claude 进行了数百次对话。 您需要的答案就在某个地方，埋藏在您无法真正搜索的两个站点和两个历史记录中。 你的人工智能历史是一座你无法挖掘的金矿，它存在于别人的服务器上。 🟢 ANAMNE 的作用 Anamne 将您的对话保存到您自己设备上的单个库中。 搜索它、组织它、将其写入 Obsidian，并使其在计算机之间保持同步。 无需帐户即可启动。 ✨ 主要功能 🔍 搜索您询问的所有内容 按标题、关键字、文件夹或标签对每个捕获的对话进行全文搜索。 使用提供商选项卡过滤到一位助手，或一次搜索所有助手。 🗂️ 整理您的历史记录将对话分类到嵌套文件夹中，添加您自己的标签，并对重要内容加注星标。 通过批量操作一次移动、标记或删除多个。 干净的阅读窗格将每个聊天显示为气泡，并带有每条消息的时间戳。 📝 同步到黑曜石 授予一个保管库文件夹一次，Anamne 会直接将带有前题和每回合标题的干净 Markdown 写入您的笔记中。 没有 API 密钥，也没有复制粘贴。 随时将任何对话导出到 Markdown 文件。 ⚡ 提示库通过填写 {{fields}} 保存您最好的提示，然后在页面上一键将其放入任何聊天中。 🖼️ 保存图像（专业版） 当 ChatGPT 或 Gemini 生成图像时，Anamne 会将完整文件及其生成的对话保存在您的存档和黑曜石保险库中，以供查看或下载。 🔄 跨设备加密同步（专业版）您的存档在您使用的每台计算机上保持同步，并在离开之前在设备上进行加密。 新的聊天和编辑可到达每台设备，自动备份可让您一键在新计算机上重建库。 🤖 更多助手（专业版）ChatGPT 和 Claude 免费。 在 Pro 中添加 Gemini、Perplexity、Grok 和 DeepSeek。 一个图书馆，一次搜索，所有人工智能。 🔒 私密设计 捕获、搜索、组织和黑曜石同步完全在您的设备上运行。 您的对话存储在本地，永远不会离开您的浏览器。 云同步是选择加入和端到端加密的：密钥保留在您的设备上，因此服务器保存的所有内容都是它无法读取的密文。 没有帐户，没有遥测。 Anamne 会读取人工智能应用程序已获取的结构化数据，因此网站重新设计不会破坏您的捕获。 🟢 适合谁生活在人工智能聊天中并厌倦了失去最好的对话的研究人员、作家、开发人员、学生和创始人。 从您已使用的 AI 网站上的工具栏打开 Anamne。 📪 有问题或反馈吗？ 发送电子邮件至 hello@getanamne.com — 我们阅读了所有内容。 🔒 隐私政策：https://getanamne.com/privacy.html 适用于 Chrome 和 Edge（具有文件系统访问 API 的 Chromium 浏览器）。 Anamne 是一款独立产品，不隶属于 OpenAI 或 Anthropic，也不受其认可或赞助。 ChatGPT 和 Claude 是其各自所有者的商标。
